description: Case style: Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glassDial style: Silver dial with embossed numbers in silver, embossed lines marking 3, 6 and 9 o'clock markings, brand name below 12 hour marking, seconds chronograph above 6 o'clock marking and has a textured centreStrap style: Stainless steel strap with press clasp closureFeatures: Chronograph display for seconds, screw to reset timeWater resistance: Upto 50 meters that allows you to use it when swimming, but not for divingWarranty: 2 years
